title: Map missing current-season MLB data and classify must-have versus optional for rebuild
objective: Identify exactly what current-season MLB data is missing and classify each missing area as must-have, high-value optional, or deferrable for the rebuild track.
paper_only_note: This is paper-only / observation-mode work. No model implementation or live strategy change is authorized from this task.
forbidden_actions: Speculate beyond evidence from the inventory
required_work: 1. Use the completed inventory as the baseline.
2. Determine what current-season MLB data is missing or incomplete.
3. Classify missing items into must-have, optional-high-value, or deferrable.
4. Produce an explicit gap map the backfill task can execute against.
acceptance_criteria: Priority classification for each major gap
verification: Show gap families and why each matters
State which gaps block the rebuild and which do not
